plugins.name: pce-health-monitor
plugins.description: Real-time PCE health dashboard with endpoint checks, CPU/memory/disk monitoring
plugins.author: Illumio

plugins.name: traffic-reporter
plugins.description: Interactive traffic flow analysis with Chart.js — top talkers, blocked flows, policy decisions
plugins.author: Illumio

plugins.name: policy-diff
plugins.description: Git-like policy change tracker — field-level diffs, history snapshots, user attribution, audit trail
plugins.author: Illumio

plugins.name: pce-posture-report
plugins.description: Security posture scoring — enforcement coverage, label coverage, policy rules, HTML+JSON reports
plugins.author: Illumio

plugins.name: pce-events
plugins.description: Real-time PCE event monitoring — Slack, Teams, PagerDuty, Email, webhooks, 15+ output plugins
plugins.author: Alex Goller

plugins.name: ai-assisted-rules
plugins.description: AI-powered policy advisor — blocked traffic analysis, tiered rule suggestions, auto-provisioning, label gap detection
plugins.author: Illumio

plugins.name: stale-workloads
plugins.description: Discover offline, unresponsive, and trafficless workloads — with optional cleanup (unpair/delete)
plugins.author: Illumio
